name: security-posture reports a clean posture and zero density when there are no findings
command: printf '[]' > e.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/security-posture.sh" --findings e.json --deps 100 --json 2>/dev/null >o.json; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.vulnerability_density===0&&j.posture==="clean"?0:1)' && echo q13-clean 1>&2
